name: Tax-Free Corporate Reorganizations

eligibility.description: Must meet statutory definitions of a reorganization, such as a Type A merger or Type B stock-for-stock exchange, and satisfy judicial doctrines like continuity of interest.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows corporations and shareholders to defer gain recognition on mergers, consolidations, and acquisitions if the transaction meets specific structural requirements (Types A through G).
